examples: Some people were unfriendly to the new recruit.
She has a very formal manner, which can seem unfriendly.
People always complain that the big banks and big companies are unfriendly and unhelpful.
That the relationship between Sir Salman and his protection teams was unprofessional, hostile and unfriendly.
The basic problem is that such efforts ignore the fact that the world is an unfriendly place.
